title: Hypurr Hour
summary_title: From $38.3 bottom to Coinbase USDC deal: How one trader caught the inflection
summary_description: Trader capitulates at the exact bottom minutes before Coinbase-Circle USDC announcement, realizing 25% revenue lift for Hyperliquid.

key_moments.label: Trader describes getting annihilated on HYPE long over three days
Built multiple seven-figure notional position through martingaling down from 43
Set stop loss at 38, then canceled it fearing market manipulation
Capitulated at 33, then flipped short on Bitcoin at 79.2 level
Woke early, discovered 19-minute-old Coinbase-USDC announcement on X
Recognized USDC, Coinbase, yield accrue instantly—closed short and bought back at 40.2
25% notional increase in HYPE run-rate revenue from USDC yield flowing to protocol
Speculates Coinbase will launch builder code frontend and potentially deeper integration
